reviews.comment:
Siendo un lugar clave p detenerse desde ambos sentidos de la ruta 9, brindan muy poca atención al pasajero en servicomprasFalta de limpieza, poca cordialidad, atención lenta y desorganizada con falta de personal. Lamentable la falta de interes en mejorar.

(Translated by Google)
As a key stop for passengers traveling in both directions on Route 9, the service center offers very little customer service. It's unclean, unfriendly, and the service is slow and disorganized due to staff shortages. The lack of interest in improvement is regrettable.

Very busy, the bar has a great selection. Lots of people, so be patient.

reviews.comment:
Muy lerdos para atender, siempre igual. Hace décadas que atienden así. Cargo combustible únicamente cuando me es necesario de lo contrario paso de largo tanto a la ida como a la vuelta

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service, always the same. They've been like this for decades. I only fill up when I absolutely have to; otherwise, I just drive right past them, both going and coming back.

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno el bar. Almorzamos lomitos y hamburguesas que salieron muy rápido y muy buenos.
Los baños limpios y equipados.

(Translated by Google)
The bar was great. We had steak sandwiches and hamburgers for lunch, which came out very quickly and were delicious.
The restrooms were clean and well-equipped.
